# Two monsters -- exercises the flush-on-next-Name path,
# and covers SP, Spell, Weapon, Shield, Armor, Undead fields.

Name            Goblin
HP              20
Difficulty      2
Agility         6
Dexterity       5
Strength        7
Wisdom          1
ArmorStr        0
SP              5
Spell           1
Weapon          2

Name            Skeleton Dragon
HP              80
Difficulty      5
Agility         4
Dexterity       3
Strength        15
Wisdom          5
ArmorStr        3
Shield          1
Armor           3
Undead
